overall.description: A first-person exploration through a dimly lit Victorian-style study and adjacent music room in a horror game. The player moves through red curtains into a wood-paneled room with medical equipment and antique furniture, approaching a mysterious figure before entering a room with hanging stringed instruments.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian study entrance with red velvet curtains

events.description: passing through red velvet curtains from outer room into the main study

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the curtain doorway into the dimly lit study, approaching the central operating table

entered.detail: heavy red curtains framing the doorway between rooms
dark wood piano with ornate detailing against the wall
large gold-framed painting of a woman in Victorian dress
brass wall-mounted lamp with warm glow
long wooden table with medical equipment in the center of the room

segments.scene_description: The segment begins looking through heavy red velvet curtains into a dimly lit Victorian study. The camera moves forward through the doorway, revealing an antique piano on the left, a large framed portrait, and a central wooden operating table illuminated by hanging oil lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: central study area with medical table and writing desk

events.description: moving closer to the hanging oil lamp increases warm illumination on the operating table surface

agents.ego_description: walking around the central operating table and examining the desk area with the lit lamp

notable_agents.action: motionless figure in white shirt standing by the tall bookshelf facing away from camera

entered.detail: wooden writing desk with illuminated banker's lamp and scattered papers
large window with heavy red drapes showing dark blue night outside
brass telescope on tripod stand near the wall
floor-to-ceiling bookshelf filled with books and objects

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the study, the camera circles the central operating table while approaching a writing desk with a warm lamp. A motionless figure in white becomes visible standing by a tall bookshelf in the background. The room features wood-paneled walls, a telescope stand, and windows showing night outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: back of study near bookshelves and medical storage

events.description: slowing down and circling while approaching the motionless figure by the bookshelf

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching and circling the motionless figure standing by the bookshelf

notable_agents.action: motionless figure in white shirt and dark pants standing facing the bookshelf

entered.detail: glass-fronted cabinet containing medical bottles and equipment
brass wall sconce with glowing bulb
large wooden storage chest with metal fittings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the back of the study, approaching a motionless figure standing before a tall bookshelf. Medical cabinets and wall-mounted lamps become visible as the camera circles the area, passing the wooden operating table on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: music room with hanging stringed instruments

events.description: entering adjacent room with numerous stringed instruments hanging from ceiling and walls

agents.ego_description: moving into the music room and panning to examine the collection of hanging instruments

entered.detail: collection of lutes and guitars suspended from the ceiling by ropes
low wooden storage cabinets under the windows
still-life painting of musical instruments in a gold frame
open doorway leading back to the study with red curtains visible

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into an adjacent music room where numerous stringed instruments hang from the ceiling. The lighting is dimmer here, with wooden cabinets under the windows and a framed painting on the wall. The doorway back to the study remains visible, showing the red curtains from the previous room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a draped entryway into the depths of a dimly lit Victorian study. It begins by pushing through heavy red velvet curtains, revealing a room anchored by an antique piano and a central wooden operating table illuminated by hanging oil lamps. As the camera moves deeper into the space, it circles the operating table and glides toward a writing desk bathed in the warm glow of a lamp. The scene then expands to reveal wood-paneled walls, a telescope stand, and dark windows, before finally settling on a motionless figure in white standing silently by a tall bookshelf in the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a clinical, wood-paneled study into a dimly lit room filled with musical instruments. It begins by gliding toward the back of the study, approaching a motionless figure standing before a tall bookshelf. As the camera circles the area, it passes a wooden operating table and reveals medical cabinets and wall-mounted lamps. The scene then shifts through a doorway into an adjacent music room, where the lighting dims and numerous stringed instruments appear hanging from the ceiling. Finally, the view expands to show wooden cabinets beneath windows and a framed painting on the wall, while the red curtains of the previous room remain visible through the open door.
